paper_metadata.title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training
paper_metadata.abstract: This paper presents E5, a family of state-of-the-art text embeddings that transfer well to a wide range of tasks. The model is trained in a contrastive manner with weak supervision signals from our curated large-scale text pair dataset (called CCPairs). E5 can be readily used as a general-purpose embedding model for any tasks requiring a single-vector representation of texts such as retrieval, clustering, and classification, achieving strong performance in both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings. We conduct extensive evaluations on 56 datasets from the BEIR and MTEB benchmarks. For zero-shot settings, E5 is the first model that outperforms the strong BM25 baseline on the BEIR retrieval benchmark without using any labeled data. When fine-tuned, E5 obtains the best results on the MTEB benchmark, beating existing embedding models with 40x more parameters.

extraction_data.innovation: E5 introduces weakly-supervised contrastive pre-training using a curated large-scale text pair dataset (CCPairs), enabling strong zero-shot and fine-tuned performance on retrieval, clustering, and classification tasks without relying on labeled data or low-quality synthetic pairs.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Weakly-supervised contrastive learning with in-batch negatives
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, Wikipedia, Reddit, S2ORC, StackExchange, News, and others (∼270M text pairs)
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on labeled datasets for specific tasks
extraction_data.extension: Consistency-based data filtering technique to remove noisy text pairs, and asymmetric design with prefix identifiers ('query:' and 'passage:') to break symmetry in text pairs.
extraction_data.research_problem: General-purpose text embeddings for retrieval, clustering, and classification
extraction_data.application: Zero-shot retrieval, few-shot text classification, zero-shot text classification, semantic textual similarity, text clustering
extraction_data.paper_title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training

extraction_data.innovation: Weakly-supervised contrastive pre-training on curated CCPairs dataset, enabling unsupervised models to outperform BM25 on BEIR benchmark.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on MS-MARCO, NQ, and NLI datasets
extraction_data.extension: Contrastive pre-training on weakly-supervised CCPairs dataset, using mined hard negatives and re-ranker scores from SimLM for fine-tuning.
extraction_data.research_problem: Text embeddings for information retrieval and semantic similarity tasks
extraction_data.application: Information retrieval, text classification, clustering, reranking, semantic textual similarity (STS), summarization
extraction_data.paper_title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training
